scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @brewery/i18n && npm run build -w @brewery/i18n-react && npm run build -w @brewery/navigation && npm run build -w @brewery/contracts && npm run build -w @brewery/api-client && npm run build -w @brewery/ui && npm run build -w @brewery/beerjson && npm run build -w @brewery/recipes-ui && npm run build -w @brewery/media
scripts.lint:packages-strict: eslint packages/api-client packages/beerjson packages/contracts packages/core packages/i18n packages/i18n-react packages/media packages/navigation packages/recipes-ui packages/test-mcp packages/ui --max-warnings 0
scripts.seed:e2e: docker compose exec -T api npm run seed:e2e
